English: TYNWALD
ST. JOHN’S, 5th JULY, 1930
ABSTRACTS
OF
ACTS FOR PROMULGATION
Printed (by Authority) by Brown & Sons Limited, “Times” Buildings, Douglas.
1.— The Diocesan Endowments Act, 1929
Manx: 1.— Yn Slattys Giootyn Yn Aspickys Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object and purport of this Act is to vest the diocesan endowments in a corporate body and provide for their administration.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy livrey harrish ny giootyn yn Aspickys gys co-corp as dy chiarail son reynn ad.

English: 2.— The Housing (Rural Workers) Act, 1929.
Manx: 2.— Yn Slattys Kiarail Thien [sic] (Obbreeyn Cheerey), Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object and purport of this Act is to provide financial assistance for housing for rural workers..
Manx: Ta’n aigney as y chooish jeh’n Slattys shoh dy chiarail argid dy hroggal thieyn da obbreeyn cheerey.

English: 3.— The Gaming and Betting Amendment Act, 1929.
Manx: 3.— Yn Slattys Bing (Lhiasaghey), Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object and purport of this Act is to amend the Gaming and Betting Acts.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey ny Slattysn Gamman as Chebbal.

English: 4.— Agricultural Returns Act, 1929.
Manx: 4.— Yn Slattys Coontaghyn Eirinys Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object and purport of this Act is to facilitate the preparartion of agricultural statistics..
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy yannoo ny saasey da eirinee dy chur stiagh coontaghyn eirinys.

English: 5.— The Merchandise Marks Act, 1929.
Manx: 5.— Yn Slattys Cowraghyn Keirdee Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to indicate the origin of imported goods.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy yeeaghyn cre veih ta cheet cooid erbee ta currit lesh stiagh s’yn Ellan.

English: 6.— The Water (Supply) Act, 1929.
Manx: 6.— Yn Slattys Ushtey (Jannoo Magh), Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to provide for a public supply of water.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy chiarail son jannoo magh yn theay lesh ushtey.

English: 7.—  The Agricultural Rates Act, 1929.
Manx: 7.— Yn Slattys Keeshyn Eirinys Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to reduce the rating of agricultural land and buildings.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy leodaghey ny keeshyn er thalloo as thieyn eirinee.

English: 8.— The Local Government Amendment Act, 1929.
Manx: 8.— Yn Slattys Gurneilys Ynnydagh Nuy Cheead Nuy as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Local Government Acts.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey ny Slattysyn Gurneilys Ynnydagh..

English: 9.— The Old Age Pensions and National Health Insurance Amendment Act, 1929.
Manx: 9.— Yn Slattys Toyrtyn Shenn Eaysh as Coadey Noi Aslaynt Ashoonagh Lhiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nuy as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the law as to health and pensions insurance.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn leigh bentyn rish toyrtyn as coadey noi aslaynt.

English: 10.— The Villa Marina (Amendment) Act, 1930.
Manx: 10.— Yn Slattys Villa Marina (Lhiasaghey) Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Villa Marina Act.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn Slattys Villa Marina.

English: 11.— The Coroners Act, 1930.
Manx: 11.— Yn Slattys Toshee-yoaree, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the law as to coroner’s fees and duties.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn leigh bentyn rish currymyn as eeckyn toshee-yoaree.

English: 12.— The Douglas Town Improvement and Artisans’ Dwellings (Amendment) Act, 1930.
Manx: 12.— Yn Slattys Lhiasaghey Balley Ghoolish as Cummalyn Obbree (Lhiasaghey) Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of  this Act is to extend the time for compulsory purchase.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy heeyney magh yn traa son kionnagh er egin.

English: 13.— The Rent Restrictions Act, 1930.
Manx: 13.— Yn Slattys Mayll (Lhiettalyn) Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to extend the law as to Rent Restriction.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy reayll ayns bree son traa sodjey yn leigh bentyn rish lhiettalyn er mayll.

English: 14.— The Highway Amendment Act, 1930.
Manx: 14.— Yn Slattys Raad Mooar Lhiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Highway Acts.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey ny Slattysyn Raad Mooar.

English: 15.— The Members of Tynwald (Disqualification) Act, 1930.
Manx: 15.—Yn Slattys Oltaghyn Tinnvaal (Mee-Lowal), Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to disqualify members of Tynwald from contracting with the
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy vee-lowal da oltaghyn Tinnvaal dy yannoo bargane lesh y Reiltys.

English: 16.—The Aliens Restriction Amendment Act, 1930.
Manx: 16.— Yn Slattys Lhiettal Joarreeyn Lhiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Aliens Restriction Act.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn Slattys Lhiettal Joarreeyn.

English: 17.— The Emplyment of Women, Young Persons and Children Act, 1930.
Manx: 17.— Yn Slattys Faill Mraane Sleih Aeg as Paitchyn, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to carry certain conventions into operation relating to women, young persons and children.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy chooilleeney oardrailyn er lheh bentyn rish mraane, sleih aeg as paitchyn.

English: 18.— The Railway Regulation Amendment Act, 1930.
Manx: 18.— Yn Slattys Gurneilys Raad Yiarn, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Railway Regulation Act.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn Slattys Gurneilys Raad Yiarn.

English: 19.— The Petroleum Filling Stations (Regulation) Act, 1930.Act, 1930.
Manx: 19.— Yn Slattys Farraneyn Petroleum (Gurneilys) Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to regulate the petroleum filling stations.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy ghurneil farraneyn petroleum.

English: 20.— The Fertilisers and Feeding Stuffs Act, 1930.
Manx: 19.— Yn Slattys Stooghyn Toraghey as Beiyagh, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the law with respect to the sale of fertilisers and feeding stuffs.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn leigh bentyn rish yn creck jeh stooghyn toraghey as beiyagh.

English: 21. — The Sea Gull Preservation Amendment Act, 1930.
Manx: 21.— Yn Slattys Coadey Foillanyn Lhiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Sea Gull Preservation Act.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn Slattys Coadey Foillanyn.

English: 22. — The Public Authorities Acquisition of Land Amendment Act, 1930.
Manx: 22.— Yn Slattys Fir-oik y Theay Goaill Thalloo Lhiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Jeih as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to modify the Land Clauses Act.
Manx: Ta aigney yn Slattys shoh dy chghlaa yn Slattys Thalloo Ayrnyn.

English: The ROYAL ASSENT to the foregoing Acts was given on the dates set out hereunder:—
Manx: Va’n Chordail Reeoil currit gys ny Slattysyn goll roie er ny laghyn fo soit magh :—

English: Nos. 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5, at Buckingham Palace ... 5th July, 1929..
Manx: Gys 1, 2, 3, 4 as 5 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 5oo VIIoo 1929

English: Nos. 6, 7, 8 and 9, at Buckingham Palace ... 5th November, 1929.
Manx: Gys 6, 7, 8 and 9 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 5oo XIoo 1929.

English: No. 10 at Buckingham Palace ... 20th January, 1930.
Manx: 10 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 20oo 1d 1930.

English: Nos. 11 and 12 at Buckingham Palace ... 28th March, 1930.
Manx: Gys 11 as 12 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 28oo IIIoo 1930.

English: Nos. 13, 14 15, 16 and 17, at Buckingham Palace ... 15th May, 1930.
Manx: Gys 13, 14, 15, 16 as 17 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 15oo Voo 1930.

English: Nos. 18, 19, 20, 21 and 22, at Buckingham Palace ... 26th June, 1930
Manx: Gys 18, 19, 20, 21 as 22 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 26oo Vioo 1930.
